content.en:
Ye Tian's aura was very strong and strong, although the aura did not represent strength, but such a powerful aura should not emanate from an ordinary domain ancestor at all.

Many of the top domain ancestors present all felt the crisis from Ye Tian's body.

And as Ye Tian blocked the void, the atmosphere was solemn to the extreme.

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, you still dare to make a move, do you really want to fight against us?"

The Ten Thousand Realms Domain Ancestor said coldly.

Ye Tian sneered: "It's not that I'm going to fight against you, it's that you want to fight against me." It's you, not me, who want to figure it out!"

The Ten Thousand Realms Domain Ancestor wanted to break Ye Tian's Five Elements ban at will.

Bang!

I saw a domain technique from the Ten Thousand Realms Domain Ancestor bombarding the Five Elements Blockade, but the Five Elements Seal was not broken and was still intact.

"This ......"

The Ten Thousand Realms Ancestor frowned.

He originally thought that Ye Tian's method of blocking this void was just an ordinary domain technique, but he didn't expect that a domain technique attack from his consummation realm did not shake the forbidden barrier of the Five Elements Seal.

"Looks like I'm underestimating you!"

Ten Thousand Realms Ancestral Dao.

At this time, the four Domain Ancestors of the Ten Thousand Realms, the Destruction Domain Ancestor, the Time Domain Ancestor, and the Golden Ding Domain Ancestor passed on their voices to each other and decided to do it.

Rumble!!!

The four Domain Ancestors of the Ten Thousand Realms and the others made a move together, ready to take down Ye Tian with the strongest strength.

The four top domain ancestors all urged the domain weapons on their bodies, and the domain techniques of the extreme level of one gate attacked towards Ye Tian.

It can be said that their four top domain ancestors shot together, and I am afraid that only the strongest domain ancestors can compete with them.

At this time, Ye Tian used the Perfection Level Holy Technique Holy Armor, and the attacks of the four top domain ancestors fell on the Holy Armor, but even Ye Tian's defense was not broken.

"No injuries?"

The four top domain ancestors were stunned.

They didn't release water, almost all of them attacked with all their strength, and the four of them shot with all their strength, even they couldn't block it themselves, such an attack would inevitably be injured, and even hit hard.

But they never expected that Ye Tian did not dodge, but confronted their attacks head-on, but they did not even break Ye Tian's defense.

What a terrible defense!

"It's definitely not a domain technique, even if it's an extreme level defense domain technique, it is impossible to have such a powerful defense!"

The Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Realms said incredulously.

He didn't know the existence of the Holy Technique, so he couldn't understand Ye Tian's methods, but he guessed that Ye Tian's defensive ability must be a means above the Domain Technique.

Seeing that Ye Tian easily defended against their attacks, the four top domain ancestors no longer attacked, but wanted to reconcile.

After all, Ye Tian could easily defend against their attacks, and his strength could not be weak.

There is no benefit to being an enemy of Ye Tian, and you will even suffer a loss.

If Ye Tian's strength was much stronger than theirs, they might be in danger of falling.

Therefore, they did not want to continue the attack.

The Ten Thousand Realms Domain Ancestor spoke: "Ten Thousand Realms Ancestor, just a few of us were just joking. "

"Joke?" Ye Tian condensed a golden thread in his hand. said: "Then I'll make a joke with you too!"

As he spoke, Ye Tian waved his hand, and a golden wire slashed towards the four of them from the Ten Thousand Realms Domain Ancestors.

"Not good!"

The expressions of the four ancestors of the Ten Thousand Realms Domain changed, and they all urged the defensive domain weapons on their bodies, and urged the defensive domain techniques with all their might.

Moreover, they wanted to dodge Ye Tian's Golden Silk Saint Technique attack as quickly as possible.

However, Ye Tian's Golden Silk Saint Technique had reached the Perfection Realm, and even without the increase in the Imperial Body Saint Technique, its power was extremely terrifying.

Under the lock-on, it was difficult for them to dodge at all.

Poof!!!

The four top domain ancestors were all cut open by the Golden Silk Holy Technique, and even the domain weapons on their bodies were like paper paste, and they couldn't stop this blow at all.

The first was the Destruction Domain Ancestor, who was the first to be hit, his body disintegrated like mud, and his soul collapsed.

In an instant, the Ancestor of the Destruction Domain fell and died.

Then there was the Golden Ding Domain Ancestor, who claimed to be invincible in defense, and other top Domain Ancestors couldn't break through his physical defenses at all.

However, apart from defense, his means are average.

But under Ye Tian's Golden Silk Saint Technique, his defense was useless, and it was useless at all.

The Golden Silk Saint Technique instantly cut his body, and the Golden Ding Domain Ancestor fell and died without any resistance.

The Ancestor of the Time Domain walked the time side, and he tried his best to use a time domain technique to change the passage of time and try to evade the Holy Technique.

But if it was other domain techniques, he could really easily dodge them.

However, under the power of the Holy Technique, the Time Domain Technique of the Time Domain Ancestor of the Time Domain was too weak to affect the time flow of the Holy Technique at all, and the Time Domain Technique was broken in an instant.

Before the Ancestor of the Years Domain could escape, he was killed by all the halves of the Golden Silk Holy Technique.

The Ten Thousand Realms Domain Ancestor couldn't stop the Golden Silk Saint Technique, but he once accidentally got a life-saving thing.

When the body of the ancestor of the Ten Thousand Realms collapsed and his soul was annihilated, that life-saving thing protected his soul and reshaped his physical body.

The life of the Ten Thousand Realms Ancestor was saved and he survived.

But there was only one life-saving thing, and he was alive now, but if Ye Tian attacked again, he would still die.

Kill the Golden Ding Domain Ancestor, the Time Domain Ancestor, and the Destruction Domain Ancestor with one blow, these are the top three domain ancestors, if the Ten Thousand Realms Domain Ancestor does not have a life-saving thing to protect his life, his existence, which is known as the strongest person in the Divine Heaven Realm, will also be killed by one blow.

"Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestors spare their lives!"

The Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Realms was so shocked that he knelt on the ground and begged for mercy.

Ye Tian's strength far exceeded his imagination, even if he broke through to the Supreme Domain Ancestor Realm, it was estimated that he would not be Ye Tian's opponent.

Isn't Ye Tian just an ordinary domain ancestor realm, why is his strength so terrifying?

This is not normal!

The other top domain ancestors were also dumbfounded, how powerful the Jinding Domain Ancestor, the Destruction Domain Ancestor and the Years Domain Ancestor were and others, it was estimated that it would only take one move to kill the average top domain ancestor, they were far above the ordinary top domain ancestor, and they were almost invincible in the Divine Heaven Realm.

But such an invincible existence was easily killed by Ye Tian like chopping vegetables.

Suddenly, one after another top domain ancestors lowered their noble heads, not daring to look directly at Ye Tian.

"Get up!"

Ye Tian didn't kill the Ten Thousand Realms Ancestor anymore, and he wasn't a person to kill.

Under the blow just now, the Ten Thousand Realms Domain Ancestor was able to keep one of his own, which proved that he had the qualifications to live.

"From today on, what should the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm look like, or what it should look like. As for the territory of the Daoshan Realm, except for the territory of the Terran and the Black Wind Mountain, I won't care about the other territories, you can occupy them at will, but you can't kill more. In short, if you dare to hit the attention of the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, then the fate of these three top domain ancestors today is below you!"

Ye Tian announced.

"Yes!"

Many top domain ancestors responded one after another, and no one dared to disagree.
